hero.kicker: Content & AI Writing · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Grammar and Paraphrasing Assistant
hero.description: Save source text, correct grammar, paraphrase into a clear tone, and review generated results from one focused writing workspace.

flow.title: Projects → Editor → Results → History
steps: Create a project with the original text and language.
Run the editor action for grammar correction, paraphrasing, or both.
Compare original, corrected, and paraphrased text with placeholder scores.
Revisit generated result history when the text needs more review.

differences.title: A calm editing workspace for reusable text
differences.description: Grammar and Paraphrasing Assistant separates source projects, generated results, and job history so users can improve text without losing the original.

items.title: Project source
items.description: Each project preserves the original text, language, and editable status.

items.title: Generated output
items.description: Results keep corrected and paraphrased text behind detail views while lists stay lightweight.

items.title: Review trail
items.description: History records show completed generation jobs without introducing provider complexity in V1.

feel.title: Focused, practical, and easy to revisit
feel.description: The app is designed for quick writing cleanup without rich-text editor overhead or heavy dependencies.

items.title: Start with plain text
items.description: Paste or draft the text once and keep it as an editable project.

items.title: Choose the direction
items.description: Run correction, paraphrasing, or both with a simple tone setting.

items.title: Review side by side
items.description: Compare original, corrected, and paraphrased versions before deciding what to use.

audiences.title: Who uses Grammar and Paraphrasing Assistant
audiences.description: Useful for people who write short-to-medium text and need a structured place to improve it.

items.title: Students
items.description: Clean up assignment drafts, notes, and study explanations.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Improve emails, updates, and internal communication.

items.title: Creators
items.description: Paraphrase captions, summaries, and article snippets into a clearer tone.

resourceSection.title: V1 workspace essentials
resourceSection.description: The first version keeps the foundation complete and intentionally lightweight.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Create, update, and delete long-lived writing records.

items.title: Results
items.description: Store generated corrected and paraphrased output with readability scores.

items.title: History
items.description: Track completed placeholder jobs and generation actions.

groupedSection.title: Common questions
groupedSection.description: The V1 scope is intentionally clear before AI provider integration is reviewed.

items.name: Does it save projects?
items.description: Yes. Projects are authenticated, owner-scoped records.

items.name: Does it generate AI text?
items.description: No. V1 uses lightweight placeholder generation until provider integration is approved.

items.name: Are full text bodies sent in lists?
items.description: No. Lists use previews and detail endpoints load full text only when needed.

items.name: Can projects be edited?
items.description: Yes. Project updates keep create-only parent data out of update payloads.

technicalSection.title: Built on the standard mini-app contract
technicalSection.description: Grammar and Paraphrasing Assistant follows the Ansiversa backend-first workflow-ready architecture.
items: Dedicated database with GrammarProjects, GrammarResults, and GrammarJobs.
Lightweight dashboard/list responses and detail endpoints for full text.
Protected workflow routes under /grammar-and-paraphrasing-assistant/projects, editor, results, and history.

finalCta.title: Open the writing workspace
finalCta.description: Create a text project and start the V1 grammar and paraphrasing workflow.
